title: Profit Cycle 001 — Restore Funnel Truth (Priority 1)
doctrine: Every action must increase the probability that an unknown visitor completes a real purchase.
todays_question: What is the single action with the highest expected increase in verified revenue?
todays_answer: Restore funnel telemetry — without it every other decision is blind. (Geo-block hypothesis ruled out by data.)

evidence.interpretation: Telemetry shows ~0% conversion; ground truth (orders + Stripe) shows 17 begin_checkout / 1 purchase. The funnel is blind, not broken business-side.

changes_shipped: src/contexts/CartContext.tsx — recordFunnelStep('add_to_cart') now fires on real user click (was missing).
src/pages/Checkout.tsx — recordFunnelStep('payment') fires the instant we redirect to Stripe.
src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx — recordFunnelStep('purchase') fires on success page (idempotent via existing lpKey).
verified_not_a_bottleneck: Geo shipping-country gate: 0 real-visitor events in 14 days — not blocking US traffic.

Edge-function CORS: curl OPTIONS from getpawsy.pet origin returns 200 + correct headers on all three failing functions. Browser CORS errors during the autopsy were caused by Cloudflare bot-flagging the headless probe.

deferred_with_reason.stripe_checkout_abandonment_autopsy: Cannot be performed from sandbox IP (Cloudflare flags as bot + geo-gate fires). Next cycle: invoke create-checkout directly via service-role, then open Stripe URL in Playwright bypassing the storefront.
deferred_with_reason.begin_checkout_waterfall_0: Hook already exists in SafeGlobalVisitorTracker on path === '/checkout'. Zero events suggests real customers may be skipping /checkout. Investigate in next cycle once payment/purchase data starts flowing.

validation_24h: Re-query analytics_funnel_waterfall for new add_to_cart / payment / purchase rows after natural traffic. Success = >0 in each step within 24h.
next_cycle_top_action_candidate: Once telemetry confirms working, run a true Stripe-page autopsy from a US-origin context to identify the 17→5→1 drop-off cause.
